name: AI-Assisted Code Review
description: Code review is time-consuming and inconsistent. Reviewers miss security issues, overlook edge cases, or focus on style over substance. Meanwhile, AI agents catch these mechanical issues instantly but can't judge business logic correctness, UX decisions, or architectural fit.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Revisão de Código Assistida por IA
pt-BR.description: Code review é time-consuming e inconsistente. Reviewers perdem security issues, UX problems, edge cases, opportunities para design improvement.
